app.name: Trafiklab Departures
app.description: Monitor public transport departures and arrivals using Trafiklab real-time data

error.missing_key: Trafiklab API key is not set. Go to App Settings.
error.invalid_key: Invalid API key. Check App Settings.
error.rate_limit: Rate limit exceeded. Reduce polling frequency.
error.not_found: Stop not found. Re-pair this device.
error.network: Network error. Check your internet connection.
error.no_data: No departures found in the next 60 minutes.
